caption:
This is a must-try unagi bowl in Ikebukuro, Tokyo 🍶✨

📍 Location: Izumo Ikebukuro
1-13-7 Nishi-Ikebukuro, Toshima City, Tokyo
A short walk from Ikebukuro Station

🕒 Hours:
Daily: 11:30 AM – 11:00 PM

💰 Price:
¥2,000–3,000（$13–20）

#tokyo #ikebukuro #unagi #unagibowl #eel #izakaya
#japanesefood #tokyofood #asukunavi #localgem #pr
transcript: What's the best restaurant in Tokyo? Hmm... Izumo. Why? There are so many big unagi. Okay, let's go! If you are looking for the best unagi bowl in Tokyo, check this out. It's located in Ikebukuro. Izumo is a local izakaya where skilled chefs carefully grill each year one by one. Then place it fresh over steaming hot rice, creating one of the most satisfying unagi bowls you'll ever try. Here we go. This is their unagi tamago rice bowl. Look at this insane portion. The eel is melting your mouth soft, packed with deep umami and the whole bowl is insanely satisfying from start to finish. Comment to unagi, we'll DM you the info.

transcript_segments.text: What's the best restaurant in Tokyo?
There are so many big unagi.
If you are looking for the best unagi bowl in Tokyo, check this out.
Izumo is a local izakaya where skilled chefs carefully grill each year one by one.
Then place it fresh over steaming hot rice,
creating one of the most satisfying unagi bowls you'll ever try.
This is their unagi tamago rice bowl.
The eel is melting your mouth soft, packed with deep umami
and the whole bowl is insanely satisfying from start to finish.
Comment to unagi, we'll DM you the info.
